meta.title: America's BIG advantage against foreign stealth fighters #f35 #stealth #usaf
meta.description:
Aggressors are an invaluable part of how American pilots train for the fight, and today, America is the only nation with dedicated 5th generation aggressor aircraft. 

Stay on top of all things Defense Tech by subscribing to Sandboxx News!
